_comment: TRIGGERS+TRANSPONDER+RADIO -> onchange datarefs (incl. ixeg/733/misc/winglets airframe option); CONTINUED (engine EPR/oil outputs, electric failures, battery charge, trims) -> continuous master-only; COMMANDS -> commands with hold relay. Excluded: throttle/reverser/yoke/rudder/brakes/axes (UDP PhysicsSync), sim m_fuel (UDP fuel stream), sim time (WeatherSync), keyboard speedbrake step commands.
